subcodes.first_line: I testify, even as God Himself did testify before the creation of all things, that verily I am the Living One in the Most Glorious Horizon and thence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشهد بما شهد الله قبل خلق کل الاشیا باننی انا حی فی الافق الابهی و اذا من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
